ticket.summary: Order Saver — Save order button does nothing
ticket.description:
Customer demo blocker: the Order Saver app at orders/index.html does not save orders when clicking "Save order".

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open orders/index.html
2. Fill in Customer, Item, Quantity, Unit price
3. Click "Save order"

Expected: order appears in Saved orders list
Actual: nothing happens — no error, no save

Reported by sales during live customer walkthrough.

resolution.summary: Click handler was bound to wrong element id
resolution.details: Button id is save-btn but listener targeted save-order. Fix: document.getElementById("save-btn").addEventListener("click", saveOrder) or use form submit handler.

timeline.comment: Raised during customer demo — save button completely unresponsive.
Logged as RAISE-47, priority High. Customer waiting on fix before renewal call.
Root cause: JS listener on #save-order, button is #save-btn.
Fixed id mismatch. Verified save + localStorage persistence.
Confirmed with sales — demo unblocked for customer call.

meetingDemoLines.reportBug: Nikki, the save button on Order Saver isn't working — can you log that in Jira?
meetingDemoLines.checkStatus: Nikki, what's the status on the Order Saver save button ticket?
meetingDemoLines.resolvedReply: RAISE-47 is done — engineering fixed a wrong button id. Save order works now. Want me to reopen the demo?
